title: NexusOS Serial Debugger Subsystem
summary: Full debugging infrastructure for NexusOS via COM1 (0x3F8). Provides structured logs, memory dumps, and stack traces (frame-pointer based) to QEMU serial terminal. Includes a 16550 UART driver (`serial.c/h`) and a high-level debugging API (`debug.c/h`). Redirection of panics and early boot info to serial allows analysis by agents without display access.
